page_title: About | Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
meta_description: Discover the academic and professional background of Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO: teacher-researcher, consultant-trainer and certified expert in marketing, management and regional integration.
og_title: About | Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
og_description: Academic background, professional experience and strategic vision of Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO, teacher-researcher and management expert.
twitter_title: About | Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
twitter_description: Academic background, professional experience and strategic vision of Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO.
hero_img_alt: Portrait of Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
hero_subtitle:
Teacher-Researcher in Anglophone African Studies & Regional Integration
Certified Expert in Marketing, Management and Local Development
hero_text_1: I am Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO, teacher-researcher, consultant-trainer and certified expert in business administration. For more than nineteen years, I have dedicated my career to higher education, professional training and strategic support for organizations across West Africa.
hero_text_2: My academic path lies at the intersection of social sciences, management and regional integration dynamics. Holding a PhD in Anglophone African Studies (UAC, specializing in regional integration), I am also pursuing a second doctorate in business administration at the University of Lagos (UNILAG), in a spirit of continuous development.
hero_text_3: Over the years, I have built in-depth expertise across several key fields: strategic marketing, institutional communication, organizational management, results-based management, and development sociology. My research focuses on regional governance, organizational performance and socio-economic development in Africa.
hero_text_4: Alongside my academic work, I operate as a principal consultant for public institutions, international organizations and private companies — including the Community of Coastal Lagoon Municipalities, the Autonomous Port of Cotonou, Ivey Business School (Canada) and the Ministry of Economy and Finance of Benin.
hero_text_5: I have led high-impact missions in strategic marketing, project monitoring and evaluation, training engineering and simultaneous interpretation, with a constant focus on the concrete and lasting impact of every engagement.
hero_text_6: My commitment is also expressed through active involvement in training young talent across several African countries (Benin, Niger, Côte d'Ivoire, Togo, Ghana, Nigeria). Convinced that knowledge is central to societal transformation, I promote an integrated approach to development grounded in expertise, innovation and regional cooperation.
academic_section_subtitle: A journey built at the crossroads of social sciences, management and regional integration dynamics, with a constant drive to connect research with real-world action.

academic_phd1_description: Topic: "Regional Integration and Corporate Performance: An Empirical Analysis of Nigeria Multinational Firms within the AfCFTA Framework".

professional_section_subtitle: A career built around three core pillars: higher education, strategic consulting and project management, at national and international level.

professional_teaching_li2: Academic supervision, student assessment and support for professional integration.
professional_teaching_li3: Facilitation of professional seminars and personal development and leadership training.
professional_teaching_li4: Active participation in academic juries and institutional deliberation processes.

professional_rcg_li2: Recruitment, training and supervision of trainer teams with a constant commitment to pedagogical quality.
professional_rcg_li3: Development of modules, materials and evaluation tools tailored to learners' needs.
professional_rcg_li4: Program monitoring and evaluation and continuous improvement in the field.
professional_translation_institution: Autonomous Port of Cotonou · Ivey Business School (Western University, Canada) · Ministry of Economy and Finance of Benin
professional_translation_li1: Translation of institutional publications, scientific articles and administrative documents (English-French).
professional_translation_li2: Simultaneous booth interpretation at international seminars, including on Islamic green finance (Turkish Government funding, Nov. 2025).
professional_translation_li3: Supervision of translator teams and coordination of high-value linguistic missions.
professional_marketing_degree: Marketing and Communication Expert / Mission Chief
professional_marketing_institution: Community of Coastal Lagoon Municipalities (CCLC) & Lux Smart Money — Benin
professional_marketing_li1: Development of a strategic roadmap and institutional communication plan.
professional_marketing_li2: Mapping of technical and financial partners (TFP) and design of an event marketing plan.
professional_marketing_li3: Organization of a strategic roundtable and mobilization of 10 billion FCFA in funding.
professional_marketing_li4: Implementation of fundraising strategies adapted to local realities.

professional_iuma_li1: Design of specialized English training programs (maritime management, finance, marketing, legal).

professional_iuma_li3: Operational management of programs and pedagogical supervision across all activities.

professional_uac_li2: Management of social dialogue with student organizations, fostering stability and consultation.

professional_lid_li2: Development of business plans and financing mechanisms for SMEs and SMIs.

vision_section_subtitle: My vision is grounded in the transmission of knowledge, the transformation of organizations and the building of sustainable development rooted in African realities.
vision_teaching_text1: I advocate for active pedagogy, grounded in andragogy principles and oriented towards building practical and analytical skills, enabling learners to adapt to professional market demands and the constant evolution of African work environments.
vision_teaching_text2: Teaching is for me a strategic lever for social transformation. It must strengthen autonomy, critical thinking and academic excellence within an evolving African context.
vision_research_text1: I pursue applied research focused on regional integration dynamics, organizational governance and socio-economic development in Africa — grounded in concrete field studies (ECOWAS, AfCFTA, Benin-Nigeria corridor).
vision_research_text2: I believe research must produce actionable knowledge, directly usable by public decision-makers, businesses and institutions to support genuinely effective policies and strategies.
vision_consulting_title: My vision of consulting and expertise
vision_consulting_text1: I support organizations in defining and implementing high-performing strategies, integrating communication, marketing and results-based management dimensions.
vision_consulting_text2: Expertise only has value when it becomes a tool for impact: sustainably improving institutional performance and strengthening the capacities of local actors.
vision_development_text1: I believe in inclusive and sustainable development, grounded in the valorization of local resources, human capacity building and regional cooperation.
vision_development_text2: Regional integration and collaboration between public and private actors are essential levers to address the economic and social challenges facing the African continent.
vision_quote: "I put knowledge, expertise and innovation at the service of sustainable, inclusive and sovereign development in Africa."
cta_section_subtitle: Explore my research, publications and collaborations.
